steps.name: Wire FileAuditAdapter into hook adapter
steps.description: Replace _NullAuditLogger with FileAuditAdapter in hook_adapter so all enforcement decisions persist to disk. Audit directory under .sbir/audit/.
criteria: Allowed action produces audit entry with decision, timestamp, proposal ID
Blocked action produces audit entry with decision and block reason
Session start check produces audit entry for session_start event
Audit file exists in proposal audit directory after any enforcement decision

steps.name: Non-blocking audit failures and multi-reason capture
steps.description: Audit write failures must not block enforcement decisions. Blocked actions with multiple rule violations capture all reasons in a single entry.
criteria: Enforcement decision returns correct result even when audit directory is unwritable
Warning logged when audit write fails
Audit entry for multi-rule block includes all block reasons

steps.name: Audit isolation and append-only properties
steps.description: Separate proposals use separate audit files. Each decision produces exactly one entry. Entries are never modified after writing.
criteria: Concurrent proposals write to isolated audit files with no cross-contamination
Every enforcement decision produces exactly one audit entry
Previously written audit entries remain unchanged after new decisions

steps.name: Crash signal cleanup on session start
steps.description: Extend session start to detect and remove stale crash signal files. Handle multiple signals, locked files (warn but continue), and clean workspaces gracefully.
criteria: Stale crash signal removed on session start and cleanup recorded in audit
Multiple crash signals all removed with each cleanup audited
Locked crash signal produces warning without blocking session
Clean workspace (no crash signals) starts normally with session audited

steps.name: Audit log retention and file size rotation
steps.description: Rotate audit entries exceeding 365-day retention window. Rotate oversized log files with timestamped archive. Preserve entries at exact boundary.
criteria: Entries older than 365 days archived; current entries preserved
Oversized log file archived with timestamp and fresh file started
Entries exactly 365 days old are preserved (not archived)
Entries 366+ days old are archived

steps.name: PostToolUse hook binding and artifact verification
steps.description: Add PostToolUse event to hooks.json with command hook to hook_adapter post-tool-use. Add _handle_post_tool_use() to hook_adapter.py. Add check_post_action(state, tool_name, artifact_info) to EnforcementEngine. Verify artifacts landed in the correct wave directory and state files are well-formed after write operations.
criteria: PostToolUse hook bound in hooks.json and dispatched by hook_adapter
Artifact in correct wave directory confirmed and result audited
State file verified as well-formed after write and result audited

steps.name: Post-action error handling and boundary cases
steps.description: Warn on misplaced artifacts, corrupted state, missing artifacts. Hook adapter ensures audit directory exists before calling engine (infrastructure concern stays in adapter, not domain). Skip validation for read-only tools.
criteria: Misplaced artifact warns with expected vs actual directory
Corrupted state file and missing artifact each produce warning and audit entry
Hook adapter auto-creates missing audit directory before post-action validation
Read-only tool use skips post-action validation entirely

steps.name: SubagentStart hook with agent-wave authorization
steps.description: Add SubagentStart event to hooks.json with command hook to hook_adapter subagent-start. Add _handle_subagent_start() to hook_adapter.py. Add check_agent_dispatch(state, agent_name) to EnforcementEngine using agent-wave mapping config. Validate dispatched agent is authorized for the current wave. Block unauthorized or unknown agents.
criteria: SubagentStart hook bound in hooks.json and dispatched by hook_adapter
Authorized agent allowed and activation audited
Unauthorized agent blocked with reason naming agent and wave
Unknown agent blocked with reason identifying it as unrecognized
Agent dispatch blocked when no active proposal exists

steps.name: SubagentStop hook for agent deactivation tracking
steps.description: Add SubagentStop event to hooks.json with command hook to hook_adapter subagent-stop. Add _handle_subagent_stop() to hook_adapter.py. Record agent deactivation in audit trail with agent name and wave number.
criteria: SubagentStop hook bound in hooks.json and dispatched by hook_adapter
Agent deactivation recorded in audit with agent name and wave number

files_to_modify: hooks/hooks.json — add PostToolUse, SubagentStart, SubagentStop event bindings

scripts/pes/domain/engine.py — add check_post_action(state, tool_name, artifact_info) and check_agent_dispatch(state, agent_name) methods; extend check_session_start() with crash signal cleanup and log rotation
scripts/pes/domain/session_checker.py — extend with crash signal detection/removal and audit log rotation logic
scripts/pes/ports/audit_port.py — no change (abstract port already exists)
files_to_create: scripts/pes/adapters/file_audit_adapter.py — FileAuditAdapter implementing AuditLogger port with append-only JSON lines, per-proposal isolation
scripts/pes/domain/agent_wave_mapping.py — agent-to-wave authorization rules (which agents are valid for which waves)
scripts/pes/domain/post_action_validator.py — artifact placement and state verification logic
scripts/pes/domain/housekeeping.py — crash signal cleanup, audit log retention rotation, file size rotation
